---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible Henry Image problem
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem in one or two sentences.

## Reproduction

List the exact command, input files, and local setup needed to reproduce it.

## Expected Result

Describe the expected CLI output or image behavior.

## Actual Result

Paste the structured error, traceback, or incorrect output details.

## Local Checks

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python .\scripts\henry_image.py quick_validate`
